name: KernelDAO
special_mechanism_summary: KernelDAO provides shared security infrastructure on BNB Chain, analogous to EigenLayer restaking on Ethereum, allowing BNB stakers to additionally secure Kernel-validated services. The Kelp component (rsETH, primarily on Ethereum) suffered a $292M bridge exploit in April 2026, triggering ~$5.4B in withdrawals across the restaking sector.
notes: C3' combination potential: BSC's nascent restaking ecosystem with KernelDAO as the primary LRT representative; April 2026 Kelp bridge exploit demonstrated systemic contagion risk in restaking protocols; BNB Chain restaking architecture is emerging (2026) with unaudited composability assumptions. sub-threshold accepted by user decision (DefiLlama BSC TVL $1.73M; stated $660M is primarily Ethereum Kelp/rsETH TVL; BSC LRT coverage gap — no qualifying alternative meets C1).
